questions.question: How many players are on a basketball team on the court at once?
questions.explanation: Each team has 5 players on the court at the same time.

questions.question: Which country has won the most FIFA World Cups?
questions.explanation: Brazil has won 5 World Cups: 1958, 1962, 1970, 1994, and 2002.

questions.question: What is the distance of a marathon?
questions.explanation: A marathon is exactly 26.2 miles (42.195 kilometers).

questions.question: Which sport is played at Wimbledon?
questions.explanation: Wimbledon is the oldest and most prestigious tennis tournament.

questions.question: How many rings are in the Olympic symbol?
questions.explanation: The five rings represent the five continents: Africa, Americas, Asia, Europe, and Oceania.

questions.question: Who holds the record for most home runs in a single MLB season?
questions.explanation: Barry Bonds hit 73 home runs in 2001.

questions.question: What is the maximum score in a single frame of bowling?
questions.explanation: The maximum score in a single frame is 30 (three strikes).

questions.question: Which country won the 2018 FIFA World Cup?
questions.explanation: France won the 2018 World Cup, defeating Croatia 4-2 in the final.

questions.question: How many players are on a soccer team on the field at once?
questions.explanation: Each team has 11 players on the field, including the goalkeeper.

questions.question: What is the name of the trophy awarded to the Super Bowl winner?
questions.explanation: The Vince Lombardi Trophy is named after the legendary Green Bay Packers coach.
